props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the date picker.

props.name: error
props.description: Sets the input to an error state.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum date value allowed.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum date value allowed.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the date field.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: Sets the date picker type. 'calendar' shows a calendar popup, 'input' shows just a date input.

props.name: value
props.description: Value of the calendar date, as a Date object or an ISO date string (yyyy-mm-dd).

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width of the date picker input.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the selected date changes.
